name: GATE-G — PR Merge Notification to Buck (AUTO-006)

nodes.name: Webhook: GitHub PR Event
nodes._note: Add this webhook URL to GitHub repo Settings → Webhooks. Content-Type: application/json. Events: Pull requests.

_hci_notes: Gate G — after import, copy the webhook production URL and add it to GitHub repo Settings → Webhooks. Fires on PR open, merge, close. Sends ntfy push to Buck with link to PR. No approval needed — notification only.
